project.name: Client Reporting
project.description: All client-facing reporting — statements, trade confirmations, and client correspondence.

boards.name: Statements Board
boards.description: Monthly, quarterly, and annual account statements for all account types.

boards.name: Confirms Board
boards.description: Trade confirmation generation and delivery — SWIFT MT515/MT518, regulatory compliance.

boards.name: Letters Board
boards.description: Regulatory and marketing letters, GDPR suppression, template versioning, bulk dispatch.

sample_tickets.summary: [UI] Client portal: statement download button on holdings page
sample_tickets.description: Add a 'Download Statement' button on the client portal holdings page. Button should only appear when a statement is available for the selected period.
sample_tickets.acceptance_criteria:
1. Button visible only when statement available.
2. Click → PDF downloads (Content-Type: application/pdf).
3. Statement dated correctly in filename: YYYYMM-account_id.pdf.
4. Button disabled and tooltip shown when no statement available.

sample_tickets.summary: [API] Statement generation REST endpoint v2 with async polling
sample_tickets.description: New v2 API for statement generation. POST /statements/generate returns a job_id immediately; client polls GET /statements/jobs/{job_id} for status.
sample_tickets.acceptance_criteria:
1. POST /v2/statements/generate returns 202 Accepted with job_id.
2. GET /v2/statements/jobs/{job_id} returns status: queued|processing|completed|failed.
3. Completed job includes download_url valid for 24 hours.
4. Failed job includes error_code and human-readable message.
5. v1 endpoint remains functional until 2026-Q3 deprecation.

sample_tickets.summary: [API] Generate T+1 SWIFT MT515 trade confirmation
sample_tickets.description: Trade confirmations must be generated and dispatched within T+1 business day as per FINRA Rule 10b-10.
sample_tickets.acceptance_criteria:
1. MT515 message generated for all equity trades within T+1.
2. Price tolerance within ±0.0001 of trade price.
3. BIC validation on all counterparty identifiers.
4. Duplicate prevention — reprocessed trades do not generate second confirm.

sample_tickets.summary: [UI] Exception management dashboard for unmatched confirms
sample_tickets.description: Operations team needs a UI to view and manage unmatched trade confirmations.
sample_tickets.acceptance_criteria:
1. Dashboard shows all unmatched confirms older than 4 hours.
2. Operations can manually match or escalate.
3. SLA timer visible per item.

sample_tickets.summary: [API] GDPR suppression enforcement before letter dispatch
sample_tickets.description: Before any letter is dispatched, the system must check the GDPR suppression list. Suppressed clients must not receive any marketing or regulatory non-essential communications.
sample_tickets.acceptance_criteria:
1. GDPR suppression check is performed before every dispatch — no exceptions.
2. Suppressed client → letter is not dispatched and incident is logged.
3. Opt-out confirmation letters are always dispatched regardless of suppression status.
4. Suppression list is refreshed from source of truth every 15 minutes.

sample_tickets.summary: [UI] Bulk letter dispatch campaign manager with 1000/min throttle
sample_tickets.description: Bulk dispatch campaigns must not exceed 1000 letters/minute to protect downstream email and postal gateways.
sample_tickets.acceptance_criteria:
1. Dispatch rate is enforced at 1000/min globally.
2. Rate limit breach → batch paused and ops alerted, not silently dropped.
3. Re-queue mechanism for paused batches.
